headline: Is Hershey (HSY) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Hershey at around US$185.94 is simply priced for steady comfort or offering real value at its current level. The stock is up 2.2% over the last week and 1.9% year to date, but it is down 8.1% over the past month and has fallen 25.3% over three years, even with a 14.4% gain over the last year and a 21.6% return across five years. Recent attention on Hershey has focused on how its stock has behaved over different time frames. The mix of shorter term weakness...

headline: HERSHEY'S KISSES AND POKÉMON ARE BACK -- AND THIS TIME, TEAM ROCKET WANTS IN
summary: Hershey's Kisses is teaming up with The Pokémon Company International for another special-edition collection — and this year, things are getting a little villainous.

headline: Nutrabolt Appoints Andrew Archambault as President and Chief Operating Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth and Operational Scale
summary: Nutrabolt, a leading global active nutrition, beverage, and wellness portfolio company best known for its brands C4 Energy, Bloom, Cellucor, and Xtend, today announced the appointment of Andrew Archambault as President and Chief Operating Officer, effective immediately.

headline: C4 Energy parent hires Hershey vet as COO
summary: Andrew Archambault, who has prior experience leading beverages at Keurig Dr Pepper, will oversee Nutrabolt's sales, supply chain and international operations.
